title: India is Leading in Urban Growth!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Indian citizens, get ready for a massive shift! A new report confirms that our major cities are now the fastest-growing metropolises on the planet. India is officially the engine of global urban growth! Five Indian cities are in the global top 15, with Bengaluru leading the charge, closely followed by Hyderabad and Mumbai as top performers. What are your thoughts on this?
